experiment_title: Observation of Phenolphthalein Color Change and Ammonia Diffusion

data.xdl_enriched:
<XDL>
  <Metadata title="Observation of Phenolphthalein Color Change and Ammonia Diffusion" goal="To observe the color change of phenolphthalein in response to sodium hydroxide and to investigate the effect of ammonia gas diffusion on the color of phenolphthalein solution." difficulty="Normal" />
  <Synthesis>
    <Hardware>
      <Component id="beaker_A" type="beaker" capacity="50ml" />
      <Component id="beaker_B" type="beaker" capacity="50ml" />
      <Component id="beaker_large" type="beaker" capacity="250ml" />
      <Component id="test_tube_1" type="test_tube" capacity="10ml" />
      <Component id="dropper_1" type="dropper" />
      <Component id="dropper_2" type="dropper" />
      <Component id="glass_rod_1" type="glass_rod" />
    </Hardware>
    <Reagents>
      <Reagent name="Distilled_Water" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="Phenolphthalein_Solution" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="Sodium_Hydroxide_Solution" state="liquid" />
    </Reagents>
    <Procedure>
      <Add vessel="beaker_A" reagent="H2O" volume="20 mL" id="step_0" />
      <Add vessel="beaker_A" reagent="C20H14O4" volume="0.3 mL" tool="dropper_1" id="step_1" />
      <Insert tool="glass_rod_1" vessel="beaker_A" id="step_2" />
      <Stir vessel="beaker_A" id="step_3" />
      <Wait time="10s" id="step_4" />
      <Transfer from_vessel="beaker_A" to_vessel="test_tube_1" volume="2 mL" tool="dropper_2" id="step_5" />
      <Add vessel="test_tube_1" reagent="NaOH" volume="0.5 mL" tool="dropper_1" id="step_6" />
      <Wait time="10s" id="step_7" />
      <Add vessel="beaker_B" reagent="NaOH" volume="5 mL" id="step_8" />
      <Wait time="5s" id="step_9" />
      
      <Wait time="180s" id="step_10" />
      
    </Procedure>
  </Synthesis>
</XDL>

graph_nodes.description: 在烧杯A中配制酚酞稀溶液：加水、加酚酞、搅拌均匀。
取部分酚酞溶液至试管，加入氢氧化钠溶液，观察颜色变化。
在烧杯B中加入氢氧化钠溶液，为后续氨气扩散实验做准备。
等待氨气扩散，观察酚酞溶液颜色的进一步变化。
